news.headline: Biofrontera Inc. announces Q1 2025 financials and business update.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) revealed that all resolutions were successfully passed at its annual general meeting. The event, held on the same day, saw approval from the Company's shareholders.
news.headline: South Bow Corp. (TSX & NYSE: SOBO) shareholders approved all resolutions at the annual general meeting held on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: Calgary, Alberta-based South Bow Corp. (SOBO) recently released its financial and operational results for the first quarter of 2025. The company, listed on both the TSX and NYSE, highlighted its financial performance in U.S. dollars. The report also includes an update on the company's outlook for the remainder of 2025.
news.headline: South Bow Corp. reports first-quarter 2025 results, declares dividend; listed on TSX & NYSE as SOBO; financial figures in USD.

news.summary: Troilus Gold Corp, based in Montreal, revealed that it has finalized a loan deal with Auramet International, Inc. The loan agreement, valued at up to US$35 million (approximately CDN$49 million), has been secured by the company. Troilus Gold Corp is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as TLG, on the OTCQX as CHXMF, and on the FSE as CM5R.
news.headline: Troilus Gold Corp secures US$35M loan with Auramet Int. for pre-dev activities. ~CDN$49M.
European firm XBP Holdings reports Q1 2025 results.

news.summary: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE), a company specializing in cryptocurrency datacenters and power generation, revealed their financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company reported total revenue amounting to $19.2 million during this period, with a net loss from operations reaching $5.6 million. Moreover, they achieved EBITDA of $0.4 million and Adjusted EBITDA of undisclosed value. Additionally, Greenidge discussed their growth prospects moving forward.
news.headline: Greenidge Generation had $19.2 million in revenue for Q1 2025, with a net loss of $5.6 million. EBITDA was $0.4 million.

news.summary: At the 2025 Annual General Meeting of Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) in Switzerland, shareholders voted to approve a cash dividend of $2.80 per share. This dividend will be paid out in four equal installments of $0.70 each. The payment dates and record dates for these installments are as follows: - 2nd Quarter, Fiscal Year 2025: Payment Date - June 2, 2025, Record Date - May 19, 2025 - 3rd Quarter, Fiscal Year 2025: Payment Date - September 2, 2025, Record Date - August 19, 2025This decision signifies a commitment to rewarding shareholders and sustaining financial growth for the company.
news.headline: Bunge shareholders approved $2.80 per share dividend, paid in four $0.70 instalments in 2025 AGM.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the state of California. The state recorded over 5,000 new cases in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 400,000. This surge in cases has raised concerns among health officials and prompted the state government to enforce stricter safety measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, there has been an alarming rise in the number of hospitalizations, with over 2,000 new patients being admitted in the last week. The state government has urged residents to adhere to social distancing guidelines and wear masks in public to help prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Major hack exposes vulnerabilities in crypto security, highlighting risks for industry leaders like Coinbase.

news.summary: Lomiko Metals Inc. (TSX.V: LMR) has revealed plans to request an extension from the TSX for the closing of hard dollar and flow-through financing until May 31, 2025. The specifics of this extension were outlined in the press release issued by the Company on April 1, 2025. Lomiko Metals Inc. possesses mineral assets related to its La Loutre graphite project located in southern Quebec. The project site falls within the territory of the Kitigan Zibi Anishinabeg (KZA) First Nation.
news.headline: Lomiko Metals to extend hard dollar and flow-through financing to May 31, 2025. Holds mineral interests in La Loutre graphite development.

news.summary: Today, the stock market showed resilience as it rebounded from early dips, with only mild losses overall. Notably, Walmart and Alibaba faced resistance from sellers following earnings reports. The Dow surged by 271 points, while Netflix emerged as a new leader, surpassing a key entry point. Companies like Sprouts Farmers and Robinhood also made significant moves.
news.headline: Stock market moves off lows, Dow up 271 points. Netflix, Walmart, and Alibaba highlighted. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Investors are anticipating a strong upward surge in the stock market, poised to reach a powerful trend. Walmart and a competitor of Tesla are currently close to optimal buying positions. This development is highlighted in a recent article discussing how the market rally is on the brink of a significant trend shift, with these two noteworthy companies leading the pack as five stocks approach ideal buy points, hinting at favorable investment opportunities.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures close to power trend, Walmart & Tesla rival near buy points. 5 stocks on radar.

news.summary: Stampede Drilling Inc. reported its financial and operational results for the first quarter of 2025. Revenue was $23,408, a 15% decrease from the same period in 2024, with a gross margin of 34% and net income of $1,454, representing a 71% decrease. Adjusted EBITDA was $5,115, down 33% from 2024. The corporation repurchased 1,130 common shares in Q1 2025. Stampede foresees geopolitical challenges impacting the energy sector in 2025 but expects modest growth in Canadian oilfield activity. As of Q1 2025, 14 out of 17 marketable rigs were operational. Stampede maintains a debt to EBITDA ratio of 1.09x and has repurchased 31,858 common shares since August 2023. In Q1 2025, capital expenditures were $4,792, and there were 17 marketed rigs with a drilling rig utilization of 53%.
news.headline: Stampede Drilling Inc. reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $23,408 (down 15%), Net Income $1,454 (down 71%), Adjusted EBITDA $5,115 (down 33%).

news.summary: CPI Aerostructures, Inc. reported a decline in financial performance in the first quarter of 2025 compared to the same period in 2024. Revenue dropped from $19.1 million to $15.4 million, gross profit decreased from $3.6 million to $1.6 million, and net income saw a loss of $1.3 million compared to a net income of $0.2 million. The company attributed this decline to a pre-tax loss of $2.1 million on its A-10 Program due to higher manufacturing costs on a fixed-price contract. Despite this, CPI Aero achieved a gross profit of 21.6% without the A-10 Program impact. The company also reduced its total debt to $16.7 million and maintained a Debt-to-Adjusted EBITDA Ratio below 3.0 for nine consecutive quarters. CPI Aero ended the quarter with a backlog of $516 million, which includes new program awards from major companies like L3Harris, Raytheon, Lockheed, and Embraer. The company remains optimistic about its long-term outlook and is focused on operational improvements and transitioning from legacy programs to programs of the future.
news.headline: CPI Aerostructures reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $15.4M, Gross profit $1.6M, Net loss $(1.3M), Backlog $516M. Details at Benzinga.

news.summary: InterRent Real Estate Investment Trust reported Q1 2025 financial results with a 10 basis point increase in same-property portfolio occupancy to 96.9% and a 5.0% YoY growth in average rent to $1,722 for the same-property portfolio. They achieved a total portfolio NOI of $40.5 million, with a 0.2% growth rate due to completed dispositions. FFO increased by 3.3% YoY to $21.8 million, with AFFO of $18.5 million. They completed multiple dispositions post-quarter, repurchased units, and maintained a Debt-to-GBV ratio at 40.9%. Brad Cutsey, President & CEO, highlighted stable performance and execution of strategic plans. Total suites decreased by 3.3% YoY, average rent per suite increased by 6.2%, and occupancy rate remained constant at 96.8%.
news.headline: InterRent REIT reported Q1 2025 results: occupancy 96.9%, AMR $1,722, NOI $39.7M, FFO $21.8M, AFFO $18.5M. Dispositions made. CEO optimistic.

news.summary: The current NL Rookie of the Year, Paul Skenes, has recently been announced as the new ambassador for New Era Cap. This partnership was solidified on May 15, 2025, in Buffalo, New York. New Era Cap, LLC, a prominent sports and lifestyle brand that serves as the exclusive on-field headwear provider, has initiated a charitable endeavor geared towards veterans, in collaboration with Skenes. This new alliance aims to bring support to veterans in need, exemplifying a commitment to developing impactful initiatives within the community.
news.headline: New Era Cap will donate $250 to veterans for every Paul Skenes strikeout this season. Paul Skenes signs as ambassador.

news.summary: Bitcoin has struggled to surpass the $105,000 mark amid US macroeconomic challenges, with institutional investor inflows and the $100,000 support level indicating growing confidence in the cryptocurrency. The decline in leveraged long positions is linked to broader macroeconomic uncertainty, with Bitcoin's price closely following stock market movements. Signs of economic weakness, including a drop in the Producer Price Index, have emerged. Increased demand for fixed income is evident, as seen in the drop in the US 10-year Treasury yield. The $105,000 rally for Bitcoin depends on macroeconomic trends. Bitcoin options demand shows strong confidence in the $100,000 support level, although optimism has waned. Net inflows of $320 million into US Bitcoin ETFs hint at ongoing institutional interest, shifting perceptions of Bitcoin as a non-correlated asset. Overall, Bitcoin's price movement is influenced by macroeconomic developments and institutional demand, with the potential for reduced price corrections even without strong leveraged bullish positions.
news.headline: Bitcoin's $105K resistance sees wavering bullish momentum amid macroeconomic challenges. $100K support reinforced by institutional inflows. Trading indicative of growing conviction in BTC's role in portfolios.
Stantec reveals outcomes of 2025 Shareholders' Meeting, discussing key details and upcoming plans.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Firan Technology Group Corporation (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF) shared the news that its FLYHT subsidiary received a Supplemental Type Certificate (STC) from Transport Canada Civil Aviation (TCCA) for the AFIRS Edge+™ product on the Boeing 737NG aircraft series. This STC signifies a significant achievement as it allows for the installation of FLYHT’s 5G Wireless Quick Access Recorder (WQAR) on the popular Boeing 737NG planes. This development opens up opportunities for the widespread use of FLYHT’s technology on one of the most commonly utilized commercial aircraft in the world.
news.headline: Firan Technology Group's FLYHT subsidiary receives STC for AFIRS Edge+™ on Boeing 737NG, enabling global deployment.
Company's Q1 2025 financial results released by FSI.

news.summary: On February 6, 2025, the Initial Public Offering (IPO) was successfully concluded with shares priced at $4.00 each, resulting in total gross proceeds of around $5.7 million. This figure includes the partial exercise of the over-allotment option.
news.headline: Callan JMB IPO on Feb 6, 2025, at $4 per share raised approx. $5.7M. Business update included in Q1 2025 results.

news.summary: To commemorate National Menstrual Hygiene Day, PeriodPalooza has organized a campaign where volunteers are distributing complimentary period products to 460 schools across Colorado. This initiative aligns with House Bill 24-1164, mandating the provision of free period products in educational institutions statewide. This effort aims to ensure access to menstrual hygiene products for students in need and promote menstrual health awareness.
news.headline: Justice Necessary fights period poverty in Colorado by providing 2.5 million products to 460 schools through PeriodPalooza.

news.summary: Aris Mining Corporation, a mining company based in Vancouver, BC, released the voting outcomes from its Annual General Meeting of shareholders conducted on May 15, 2025. The meeting saw participation from shareholders owning a total of 63,558,598 shares. The company trades on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: ARIS) and the New York Stock Exchange-A (NYSE-A: ARMN).
news.headline: Aris Mining announces voting results from 2025 AGM: Shareholders holding 63,558,598 shares participated.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) announced that they will be paying a monthly dividend of $0.11 per common share for May 2025. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 13, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 31, 2025.
news.headline: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) to pay $0.11 monthly dividend on June 13, 2025 to shareholders of record on May 31.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Shanghai, U Power Limited (Nasdaq: UCAR), a company focused on vehicle sourcing services, has expressed its ambition to evolve into a comprehensive provider of electric vehicle (EV) battery solutions in China. This news was shared by U Power, which aims to expand its services and offerings in the realm of EV batteries within the Chinese market.
news.headline: U Power Limited filed its 2024 Annual Report with the SEC; aims to be a leading EV battery solution provider in China.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (CAPREIT) disclosed its monthly distribution for May 2025. The distribution amount is $0.12916 per Unit ($1.55 annually) and will be paid on June 16, 2025. Unitholders as of May 30, 2025, will receive the distribution. CAR.UN on the TSX is the stock symbol for CAPREIT.
news.headline: CAPREIT announces $0.12916/unit May 2025 distribution, totaling $1.55 annually. Payable on June 16, to Unitholders.

news.summary: Today, Veeco Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ: VECO) disclosed the successful completion of individual exchange transactions known as the “Exchanges” with all holders of its 3.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2027 (the “2027 Notes”). The Company entered into privately negotiated exchange agreements for this purpose.
news.headline: Veeco Instruments Inc. announced private exchanges and cancellation of 3.75% Convertible Notes due 2027.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Sun Life Financial Inc. disclosed that it does not plan to redeem its existing Class A Non-Cumulative Rate Reset Preferred Shares Series 8R, also known as the Series 8R Shares. The company, listed on the TSX as SLF and on the NYSE as SLF, made this decision public, emphasizing their intention to retain these shares without redemption.
news.headline: Sun Life won't redeem Class A Non-Cumulative Rate Reset Preferred Shares Series 8R. No intention for Series 9QR either.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on May 15, 2025, Precision Drilling Corporation disclosed the outcome of the board member election during its 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The shareholders voted in favor of all eight nominee directors outlined in the Company’s Management Information Circular from April 2, 2025. Notably, seven of the elected directors are independent. This decision solidifies the leadership structure for Precision Drilling Corporation moving forward.
news.headline: Precision Drilling Corporation reports election results from 2025 meeting; all eight board members approved by shareholders.

news.summary: Chainlink co-founder Sergey Nazarov predicts asset tokenization will enhance capital movement across traditional markets like treasuries, equities, and real estate. At Consensus 2025, he stressed the importance of quality assets and seamless payments for institutions to adopt this transformative shift. Chainlink recently partnered with Kinexys and Ondo Finance to develop payment rails for tokenized real-world assets, such as the US Government Treasuries Fund. The partnership aims to streamline financial transactions using Chainlink's Runtime Environment. This reflects a growing institutional interest in cryptocurrencies and Web3 tech, driven by favorable post-2024 election regulatory changes in the US. Chainlink's decentralized oracle network focuses on connecting smart contracts with real-world data and systems, positioning itself as an upgrade to legacy financial protocols. Sergey Nazarov emphasizes the importance of the US maintaining competitiveness in tokenized assets to thrive in the global finance landscape.
news.headline: Tokenizing assets to enhance capital flow speed in traditional markets, says Chainlink's Nazarov. Shift targets asset classes like equities, real estate. Partnered with Kinexys for payment rails onchain. Regulatory and institutional acceptance of crypto and Web3 tech improving post-2024. Chainlink aims for virtuous cycle to boost industry success. Decentralized oracle network linking smart contracts, real-world data, APIs for financial transactions. US urged to secure competitive edge in global finance. Ethereum leads $16.1T tokenization race.

news.summary: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: ERE.UN, “ERES”) has announced the declaration of the May 2025 monthly cash distribution totaling €0.005 per Unit and Class B LP Unit. This amount is equivalent to €0.06 per Unit on an annual basis. The distribution is set to be paid out to Unitholders recorded on May 30, 2025. Payments will be made on June 16, 2025.
news.headline: ERES announces May 2025 Distribution of €0.005 per Unit, equivalent to €0.06 per Unit annually. Paid to Unitholders on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois, the enterprise adoption of AI systems has seen a significant surge, aiming to enhance operations, decision-making, and customer experience. However, along with the advantages, there are challenges and risks that require efficient governance. Organizations can address AI governance by utilizing ISACA’s COBIT framework, renowned for its excellence in information and technology (I&T) governance. COBIT serves as a reliable standard in this domain, ensuring proper management of AI systems.
news.headline: Use COBIT for AI governance to manage risks in booming industry. ISACA's framework ensures security and management.

news.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) based in Round Rock, Texas, will host a conference call on May 29, 2025, at 3:30 p.m. CDT to review its fiscal 2026 first quarter financial performance. The event will be accessible to the public through a live audio webcast on Dell Technologies’ website at investors.delltechnologies.com. A recording of the conference will be archived on the same site. Following the call, the company will release the results alongside financial statements through a press release.
news.headline: Dell Tech (NYSE: DELL) to hold conference call on May 29, 2025, at 3:30 pm CDT to discuss Q1 fiscal 2026 results. Live webcast available.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Polly, a top provider of advanced enterprise technology and AI for mortgage capital markets, is setting new benchmarks for the industry. Their latest product, pricing, and eligibility (PPE) engine are transforming the loan officer (LO) experience. Powered by Polly/™ AI, incorporating cutting-edge AI/ML algorithms and Polly's exclusive technology, data, and analytics, these improvements enhance flexibility and overall quality.
news.headline: Polly improves LO experience with mobile features and AI automation in PPE engine using Polly/AI technology.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), a prominent global provider of enterprise software support and innovation solutions, shared that Chief Financial Officer Michael L. Perica and Vice President Dean Pohl will engage in presentations and investor meetings. The company, recognized as a primary third-party support provider for Oracle, SAP, and VMware software, will participate in conferences on May 28, 2025. These events offer opportunities for one-on-one interactions and small group meetings with investors.
news.headline: Rimini Street to attend investor conferences in 2025, CFO and VP to present - LAS VEGAS - RMNI announces participation at May 28 conference.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Wrap Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: WRAP) revealed their financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31. Wrap Technologies, Inc. is recognized globally for its cutting-edge public safety technologies and non-lethal tools.
news.headline: Wrap Technologies, Inc. announces Q1 2025 results. Retains NASDAQ: WRAP. Leader in public safety tech.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Primech AI Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Primech Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PMEC), took part in the Robotics session organized by the Building and Construction Authority and JTC Corporation in Singapore. The event, held at Temasek Polytechnic, focused on exploring advanced robotic solutions for the facilities management industry. Numerous industry experts attended the discussion to delve into innovative approaches aimed at enhancing operations within the sector.
news.headline: Primech AI debuts HYTRON LITE cleaning robot at Singapore event, ft. leaders in FM sector. Event co-org by BCA & JTC.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, NASA celebrated Norway joining the Artemis Accords during an international signing ceremony. This commitment signifies Norway's dedication to peaceful, transparent, and responsible space exploration practices. This recent addition brings the total number of countries participating in the Artemis Accords to [specific number], further solidifying the alliance's mission. NASA expressed appreciation for Norway's decision to join this crucial initiative, highlighting the importance of international cooperation in advancing space exploration.
news.headline: NASA welcomes Norway as 55th nation to sign Artemis Accords for peaceful space exploration.

news.summary: Significant contracts to sell semiconductor chips to the United Arab Emirates (U.A.E.) and Saudi Arabia have sparked controversy within the U.S. government. The dispute revolves around concerns that these deals could result in advanced artificial intelligence technology being exported abroad.
news.headline: US government divided over Trump's chip deals with Saudi Arabia & UAE due to concern over shipping cutting-edge A.I. overseas.

news.summary: Sidus Space (NASDAQ: SIDU) revealed its financial performance for Q1 of 2025 and business developments. The company launched LizzieSat®-3 (LS-3) and progressed with a significant technology implementation during this period. The Q1 ended on March 31, 2025. Sidus will conduct a conference call and webcast on Thursday, May 15, at 5:00 p.m. ET. The quarter was crucial for Sidus as they laid the groundwork for future projects.
news.headline: Sidus Space released Q1 2025 financial results, launched LizzieSat®-3, and has a webcast today at 5 p.m. ET.

news.summary: According to Decrypt's findings, the rideshare company started utilizing map data from a platform powered by Hivemapper in the previous year.
news.headline: Lyft partners with Solana-based Hivemapper for decentralized mapping data, sourced since last year.

news.summary: Trust Stamp disclosed its 2025 Q1 10-Q filing after the Nasdaq market closed on May 15, 2025. The company provided estimated 2025 guidance and highlighted significant growth in customer enrollment on its SaaS Orchestration Layer. This development showcases Trust Stamp's momentum and potential for the year.
news.headline: Trust Stamp files its 2025 Q1 10-Q after Nasdaq close on May 15, 2025. Provides forward-looking estimates and reports strong customer growth on SaaS platform.

news.summary: In Kapalua, Hawaii, on May 15, 2025, Maui Land & Pineapple Company, Inc. (NYSE: MLP) released their financial report for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025, showcasing their performance. They introduced a new agriculture-focused business initiative aimed at enhancing the value of currently unused croplands and fostering economic growth on Maui. More information will be disclosed during the Annual Meeting of Stockholders happening virtually on May 21, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. (Hawai‘i Standard Time), through a conference call and on the company's website simultaneously.
news.headline: Maui Land & Pineapple Co. reports Q1 2025 results and new agri-business venture aiming to revitalize Maui's croplands.

news.summary: Doximity Inc (NYSE: DOCS) released its fiscal fourth-quarter results, revealing that Q4 revenue stood at $138.29 million, surpassing estimated $133.73 million. Their Q4 Adjusted EPS was 31 cents, exceeding estimates of 27 cents. Total revenue saw a 17% increase year-over-year, with subscription revenue also up 17% at $131.9 million for the quarter. The company's weak guidance led to a decline in shares post-release. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Doximity Stock (NYSE: DOCS) falls on Q4 earnings miss and weak guidance. Q4 revenue: $138.29M, EPS: 31 cents. Subscription revenue: $131.9M.

news.summary: One Park Financial, located in Coconut Grove, Florida, has achieved impressive recognition in the 2025 Sun Sentinel's Top Workplaces. The company secured the third position and also emerged as the winner of a prestigious Communication Award. This acknowledgment showcases the company's commitment to excellence in the workplace environment. The announcement was made on May 15, 2025, highlighting the company's continued success. One Park Financial's achievements underline its dedication to fostering a positive and productive work culture.
news.headline: One Park Financial receives Sun Sentinel's Top Workplaces Award for 8th time, ranking 3rd in 2025. Communication award won.

news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland on May 15, 2025, Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH) announced a corporate update. The company, known as Shuttle Pharma, is a specialty pharmaceutical firm in the discovery and development stage. They concentrate on enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy (RT).
news.headline: Shuttle Pharma announces corporate update, focusing on improving outcomes for cancer patients with radiation therapy.
